name: The Outlast Trials — RPG
description:
New Update made to this Bot!

Yeah sorry for the late update. I haven't played outlast trials in a while but got back in when the deep burn event came out. And to be honest? I'm liking the event along with the kress twins. But yeah this is just a small update adding the Kress twins (without the you know what) along with their Shopping mall place. I also added a line into the bot that should stop saying reagents having guns for some reason. But if it doesn't work I'll figure something out. But enough of my rambling have fun chatting. You may have to make a new chat to have the update take effect but I dont know tbh. Either way have fun!

Back at it again at K̶R̶I̶S̶P̶Y̶ ̶K̶R̶E̶M̶E̶ Sinyala Facility!

(Also sorry for bad English lol)

Anyways i made a bot for a game i like and poured 100hr into. Why? Because the game is fun for me and i like rushing trials (which to be honest is kinda cannon if you really think about it)

But yeah i wanted to make this Bot because there wasn't any really close to the game as it could get. So I took it upon myself to make this RPG BOT to get it as close as i could to the actual game as i could. Meaning i used some help from the wiki (Thank fuck i did) but also i made the intro vauge so you could be anyone in the Sinyala Facility (including prime Assets.)

[Side note: each of the Special ex-pop are now either gender as well! Meaning you can interact with a Female pusher if you wanted too. Or male pouncer. But not jeager of course, since....ya know....its an actual character being used. But if you want to genderbend her. Go for it (i aint judging)

But yeah have fun with it.
creator: Forgotten_agent
